rulings.Case Title: KEITH SIMMONS et al VS. A.W. CHESTERTON COMPANY et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION For Protective Order Re Deposition Of David Lucchetti And Request For Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: On calendar for Tuesday, March 30, 2010 in Department 220 at 9:00 a.m., Line 1. Defendants Pacific Coast Building Product Inc.'s Motion for Protective Order Regarding Deposition of David Lucchetti and Request for Monetary Sanctions is continued to April 7th to give the parties a further opportunity to meet and confer over the scope of Mr. Lucchetti's deposition. If all issues raised by the motion have not been resolved before then, by 4pm on April 6th the parties, without any argument, must send an email to contestasbestostr@sftc.org specifying what issue or issues remain in dispute. =(220/JJM)
